title: Resumen de recomendaciones políticas sur de Europa
subtitle: ¿Pueden las pequeñas explotaciones y las pequeñas empresas alimentarias de los países del sur de Europa de SALSA garantizar una seguridad alimentaria sostenible?
description: A policy brief offering targeted recommendations to national and regional authorities in Southern Europe to strengthen the role of small farms in regional food systems and security. Based on findings from the EU-funded SALSA project across ten NUTS3 regions, it identifies key needs in market integration, climate adaptation, generational renewal, and innovation, and proposes regulatory, financial, and advisory measures.
